/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/picoquic_ct.dir/picoquic_t/picoquic_t.c.o -o picoquic_ct  libpicoquic-test.a libpicoquic-core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so _deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-openssl.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl _deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-fusion.a _deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-minicrypto.a _deps/picotls-build/libpicotls-core.a libpicoquic-log.a
